item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, terkadang kebijakan pembangunan lebih fokus pada peningkatan ekonomi yang cepat, sehingga hak-hak dasar warga sering kali terabaikan.

notes: Agent A consistently rejects a simple society-over-rights priority and argues for balancing collective interests with basic rights. Agent B starts with qualified support for prioritizing society, then moves toward rights-protective concerns about development, minority groups, and oversight. Mandarin and Indonesian content were scored from observable text; Agent A's turn 5 appears to respond to a claimed view of China even though Agent B's prior turn mainly discussed Indonesia.
